---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
author: "`r params$report_author`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    code_folding: hide
params:
  # Engine flag: TRUE only when this template is stitched into the
  # combined report (set by the parent). Leave false for normal renders.
  combined_mode: false
  # Master Data Path
  data_path: !r here::here("1_data", "master_macro_panel.csv")

  # Variables
  row_var: "district"        # categorical axis -> rows
  col_var: "year"            # categorical axis -> columns
  value_var: "literacy_rate" # cell value (ignored when aggregate = "count")

  # How to get one value per (row, col) cell:
  #   "none"  = data already has one row per cell; use value_var directly
  #   "count" = count rows per cell
  #   "mean" / "sum" = aggregate value_var per cell
  aggregate: "none"

  # Print the numeric value inside each cell
  show_values: true

  # Policy-Facing Labels
  metric_name: "Literacy Rate (%)"

  # --- Report Text (all editable; leave "" to use the smart default) ---
  report_title: "Category Matrix: Heatmap"
  report_author: "Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi"
  chart_title: ""
  chart_subtitle: ""
  x_label: ""
  y_label: ""
  source_note: "Generated via CERP Analytics Template"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = !isTRUE(params$combined_mode),
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev.args = list(bg = "#FAF9F6"),
  fig.path = paste0(here::here("4_output", "figures"), "/"),
  fig.width = 9,
  fig.height = 5.5,
  fig.retina = 3
)
```

```{r cerp-style, echo=FALSE, results='asis', eval=!isTRUE(params$combined_mode)}
cat("<style>", readr::read_file(here::here("2_R", "cerp_style.css")), "</style>")
```

```{r load-and-prep}
library(tidyverse)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

# Load data (headers/values whitespace-scrubbed)
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)

# value_var is only required when it will actually be used
required <- c(params$row_var, params$col_var)
if (params$aggregate %in% c("none", "mean", "sum")) {
  required <- c(required, params$value_var)
}
cerp_validate(raw_data, required)

# Build the plot object now so the chunk below can size fig.height from the
# number of rows it actually contains (nlevels of p$data$RowCat). All cell
# aggregation, ordering + labels live in viz_heatmap_matrix().
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.6_viz_functions.R"), local = TRUE)

p <- viz_heatmap_matrix(
  data           = raw_data,
  row_var        = params$row_var,
  col_var        = params$col_var,
  value_var      = params$value_var,
  aggregate      = params$aggregate,
  show_values    = params$show_values,
  metric_name    = params$metric_name,
  chart_title    = params$chart_title,
  chart_subtitle = params$chart_subtitle,
  x_label        = params$x_label,
  y_label        = params$y_label,
  source_note    = params$source_note
)
```


```{r plot-heatmap-matrix, fig.height=max(4, 0.55 * nlevels(p$data$RowCat) + 2.5)}
p
```
